violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed eggs, pre-made items stored on floor in cooler.

Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Smoked and cooked pork chops and pulled pork that were vacuum sealed at the Burke location is not allowed. This product has to be from a USDA inspected facility.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food *(prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Packages of vacuum sealed deli meats in the refrigerated case exceeded the 30 days allowed under food code. These dates ranged from 45 to 60 days. All vacuum sealed deli meats and cheeses must be dated to not exceed 30 days.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
